tool_args.label: Spring Track Work Programs - March 14, 2023
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules to support track maintenance on the Montauk Branch. Additionally, schedules will be temporarily adjusted to support the replacement of a portion of the Van Wyck bridge which is located just west of Jamaica Station.

payload.title: Spring Track Work Programs
payload.description: Staff summary informing the Long Island Committee of LIRR track maintenance on the Montauk Branch and Van Wyck Bridge replacement schedule adjustments

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subject SPRING TRACKWORK PROGRAMS Date March 14, 2023
This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules to support track maintenance on the Montauk Branch.

tool_args.label: Montauk Branch
tool_args.raw_text: Track Maintenance – Montauk Branch – On Saturday, April 8th, one of two main tracks will be taken out of service on the Montauk Branch between Valley Stream and Jamaica
